sections.location: Fire alarms are located outside the bedrooms and in the hallways.
The water heater is located in the closet near the laundry room.
The circuit breaker is on the wall near the living room.
The water shut off is located in the front yard near the curb.
The HVAC vent is on the wall near the circuit breaker in the living room.
The electric meter is located on the left side of the home's exterior.
The thermostat is located on the wall near the circuit breaker in the living room.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
